item.title: First post
item.description:
Hello, world!

Some test image here:

item.title: About
item.description:
Hello! I’m Maksim Iakunin (Russian: Макси́м Яку́нин), a software developer skilled in Java. I’m keen on DevOps, CI/CD and Open Source.

I decided to try myself as a techblog author. Here I’ll be sharing my experience from time to time.

Any constructive feedback is appreciated.
